case_title: MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. VS. RAYMOND BROCKER ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. SERVED SEP-24-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BROCKER, RAYMOND
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BROCKER, RAYMOND
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BROCKER, RAYMOND DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROCKER, RAYMOND THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1008 LARKIN STREET, APARTMENT NUMBER 309, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
